title: Crumbly Garlicky Wholegrain Bread Crumble
description: An adventurous Argentinean dish featuring wholegrain bread crumbled and seasoned with garlic for a paleo-friendly breakfast option.
instructions: Toast the bread in a dry skillet over medium heat until lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Once toasted, let it cool slightly and then crumble into small pieces using your fingers or fork.
In a small bowl, mash some of the garlic cloves to make a paste. Add sea salt and olive oil to taste.
Spread the garlic mixture evenly over the crumbled bread on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 10-15 minutes, tossing gently halfway through cooking time.
Remove from oven and let cool before serving.
